titles.title: There’s No Mountain I Can’t Climb

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have been on the mountain and in the valley so low When it seemed I’d never had a place to go, Then I found Jesus, now He is mine; And there’s no mountain I can’t climb.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is no mountain that we’ can’t climb When I say ‘we’ I mean Jesus and me If you got Jesus and He is thine, There is no mountain that you can’t climb.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was in despair and troubles beset me, Tears filled my eyes and I could not see; Till I trusted Jesus and His love divine, Now there’s no mountain that I can’t climb.
